Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing; Ccp 585(D)
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Continued To Dec-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing, Judicial Notice, Request For The Dismissal Of The Complaint, Points And Authorities And Declaration
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edward Novak, Defendant appearing in pro per;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - On the First call of the matter at 9:40, there was no appearances on the matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDWARD NOVAK's Notice of Hearing, Judicial Notice, Request For The Dismissal Of The Complaint - The Court denies defendant Edward Novak's unopposed motion to dismiss the complaint without prejudice. Default was entered against Edward Novak on February 24, 2016. Edward Novak must first vacate the default before this Court can decide his motion to dismiss. Order signed in open court. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/ac

* * * The matter was called again at 10:05 a.m. with Mr. Edward Novak appearing late, who also gave notice to the opposing party. The court reaffirms its order when the matter was called for the first time. * * *
